detail: get_best_ask() was reading worst ask (~0.99) instead of best (~0.45-0.60) for 19 days due to wrong sort order. Fix: min(asks). Post-fix: 9 signals fired within 1 minute, 8 live fills in 5-minute window
Oracle lag, pair-sum arb, and FIFO maker rebate all falsified. Three theses, multiple weeks of data, decisive falsification

194W/112L confirms post-cull paper run is meaningful. Enough sample to evaluate gate. Also confirms cull was the problem

Four-layer memory (working/episodic/semantic/personal) + protocols + skills. CLAUDE.md at /root/ auto-loads rules. Purpose: eliminate copy-paste between Claude Chat and Claude Code, kill /mnt/project drift, persistent context across sessions

action: Built strategic-review skill (Layer 1 of pipeline progression)

Explicit constraints: no decisions, no backtests, no P&L projections — pure triage. First real run produced STRATEGIC_THREADS_2026-04-19.md. action: CB-DECAY-MONITOR gate closed — 4 bleeders demoted to WATCHLIST_ONLY

Demoted 4 bleeders meeting n>=10, WR<42%, negative P&L: 0xef185339 (n=31, 41.9%, -$4.49), 0x2c1bf2a1 (n=14, 28.6%, -$3.19), 0xe3084ecc (n=19, 31.6%, -$1.58), 0x5e59a357 (n=12, 33.3%, -$1.92). Held 0x8a81855d in T2 pending n>=50 or single-loss >$5 despite -$32K on-chain flag.

Grep for KrajekBot/PolyArb refs surfaced polybot.service active+running since Apr 11 10:44 UTC (9 days, 50k+ rounds, single market btc-15m, 4 PAIR FILLED events today). Deep diagnostic confirmed PAPER_MODE=true + FIFO_PAPER_MODE=true, funder=None in clob_executor.py:79 — no real capital at risk, simulated $500 bankroll. Restart mechanism: Restart=always on one-off manual Apr 11 start (no cron/timer). BigW confirmed unauthorized. Action: systemctl stop + disable polybot.service, confirmed inactive+disabled, maker.log mtime frozen. Revealed rule-integrity issue: two things both called 'polybot' conflated in retirement narrative — PolyArb series (genuinely retired) vs base spread maker in polybot.service (alive+paper until today). /usr/local/bin/pb was therefore a live control pointing at paper-mode shadow, not a no-op.

Four independent documentation-drift events surfaced in 6 days: (1) WORKSPACE.md stale by full day (header Apr 18 vs Apr 20 session), (2) sports_watchlist.json pruned 2257->162 Apr 15-17 without commit, (3) polybot.service mis-labeled retired while running 9 days, (4) /opt/hub/healthcheck.py orphan duplicate of cleaned /root/healthcheck.py. Memory-scaffold migration thesis (Apr 18): evening cycle keeps docs current. Four drifts in six days says thesis not holding at current cadence. Pattern: the action lands, the follow-through doesn't. Not today's action — flagged for infra review. Candidate remediations: (a) systemd-level alerting on services-running-but-not-documented-live, would have caught polybot.service in <24h; (b) evening_updater.py extension to diff expected vs actual systemd unit state and surface delta; (c) WORKSPACE freshness check in morning-check skill. Today was forensics/reconciliation not development — only CB demote is revenue-side work. Tomorrow: actual CopyBot dev (CB-EXIT-MIRROR data prep or CB-SCORE-RESOLVED-ONLY audit).
